title: The 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Playbook
hook: A tactical low-ticket funnel operating manual for SaaS, professional services, and local businesses in 2026. The math first (because most low-ticket offers fail on math, not creative). The 7-step funnel architecture from lead magnet to backend. Page-by-page specs with copy templates and word counts. Vertical plays for SaaS trials, paid intake for lawyers and dentists, and local first-visit voucher funnels. The 7-day buyer email sequence. FTC Click-to-Cancel and Stripe chargeback rules. The pricing psychology that still works in 2026.
benefits: Funnel math worked through: AOV needed to cover paid CAC, the order-bump and OTO contribution to AOV, the LTV math that makes a -$10 first sale profitable inside 90 days.
The 7-step 2026 funnel architecture: lead magnet to tripwire to bump to OTO to downsell to continuity to backend. With dollar amounts at each step and the math floor.
Page-by-page specs: squeeze, sales, order, OTO, downsell, thank-you. Conversion benchmarks, word counts, layout rules, and copy templates for each.
Vertical plays: SaaS $1 paid trial, lifetime deal launch tactics, annual upfront. Professional services paid intake. Local first-visit voucher funnels.
The 7-day buyer email sequence with subject lines and body templates. Plus the 30/60/90 expansion path that converts low-ticket buyers to high-ticket clients.
Tracking + compliance: iOS attribution post-Jan 2026, FTC Click-to-Cancel rule status, Stripe chargeback rules with the $15 + $15 fee math, and continuity offer copy that survives dispute monitoring.
Pricing psychology that still works in 2026: the $7, $27, $47, $97 thresholds, charm pricing vs round numbers, and why the $1 trial pattern works when nothing else does.
The 10 most common 2026 failures and the fix for each. From under-priced OTOs to fulfillment friction to over-stacked Hormozi-style scammy stacks.
squeezeBullets: Funnel math worked through: AOV needed to cover paid CAC, the LTV math that makes a -$10 first sale profitable
The 7-step 2026 funnel: lead magnet, tripwire, bump, OTO, downsell, continuity, backend. Dollar amounts at each step
Page-by-page specs for squeeze, sales, order, OTO, downsell, thank-you. Benchmarks, word counts, copy templates
description:
Low-ticket funnel mechanics changed materially in the last twelve months. The price ladder migrated upward: the standard tripwire was $7 in 2015, $27 to $47 by 2020, and $47 to $97 in 2026 because click costs and audience saturation killed the math at lower prices. iOS attribution windows narrowed to 7-day click + 1-day view as of January 12, 2026. Stripe chargeback fees changed in mid-2025 to $15 + $15 dispute counter-fee, with subscription transactions explicitly excluded from Chargeback Protection. Meta enforcement against income-claim creative tightened. The FTC Click-to-Cancel rule was vacated by the Eighth Circuit in July 2025, then reissued as an Advance Notice of Proposed Rulemaking on January 30, 2026. ASC and Advantage+ thresholds dropped, putting AI campaigns in reach of small operators for the first time.

The Hormozi-style $100M Offers framework still works, but the buyers are now pattern-matching against the over-stacked scammy version of it. Restraint and authenticity beat over-stuffing in 2026.

This playbook is the small-operator update. Eight parts, all tactical, all built for SaaS, professional services, and local businesses running real budgets.

Part 1, The 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Reality.

Part 2, Funnel Math First. The CAC vs AOV vs LTV math, with worked examples by price point. Why the front-end is for customer acquisition, never profit.

Part 3, The 7-Step Funnel Architecture. Lead magnet, tripwire, order bump, OTO, downsell, continuity, backend. Dollar amounts at each step.

Part 4, Page-by-Page Specs. Squeeze, sales, order, OTO, thank-you. Word counts, layout rules, copy templates.

Part 5, Vertical Plays. SaaS $1 trial, lifetime deal launches, annual upfront. Professional services paid intake for lawyers and dentists. Local first-visit voucher funnels.

Part 6, The 7-Day Buyer Email Sequence. Subject lines and body templates. Plus the 30/60/90 expansion path.

Part 7, Tracking + Compliance. iOS attribution post-Jan 2026. FTC Click-to-Cancel status. Stripe chargeback math. Continuity copy that survives.

Part 8, Pricing Psychology + 10 Common Failures. The $7, $27, $47, $97 thresholds. Charm pricing. The $1 trial mechanic.

Written for solo founders, in-house marketers, and agency operators running low-ticket funnels for SaaS, professional services, and local businesses in 2026.

Included as a printable PDF and a duplicatable Notion reference.
emailSubject: Your 2026 Low-Ticket Funnel Playbook is ready
